title: Horrorland 2
description: A modpack only for the bravest, now updated to the latest version. With more terrifying mods and tons of evil creatures to discover!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Horrorland2/MP_Horrorland2_header.webp) Horrorland returns darker, more immersive, and more terrifying than ever before. This new version of the modpack takes Minecraft horror even further, adding new dimensions, terrifying creatures, immersive sounds, and haunting visuals that will make you question whether you’re truly alone. Every cave hides something. Every shadow might be watching you. Every night could be your last. Will you survive the fear? ### **Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?**

I recommend **[Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code **[to get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** on your purchase. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Horrorland2/MP_Horrorland2_description.webp) Surviving in this modpack will be a complicated task, but by no means impossible. However, what will truly test your courage will be spending a single night without getting scared... because fright is guaranteed! We’ve added a large variety of horror mods and terrifying creatures whose only purpose is to hunt, haunt, and shock you when you least expect it. Every sound, every shadow, every corner could hide something waiting for you… 🕷️ Psychological and classic horror combined. ⚔️ Epic adventure and combat. 🌲 Exploration and new worlds. 🧱 Base building and customization. ⚙️ Performance and optimization. 🎃 Perfect for Halloween... or any dark night. And remember — Horrorland 2 is ideal for multiplayer! Share the fear (or the screams) with your friends for an even more unforgettable experience. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Horrorland2/MP_Horrorland2_screenshots.webp) ![screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nqJVDbgi/images/2b516af760e27e0361cdab2650d54beff6ccc615.jpeg) ![screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nqJVDbgi/images/b039c145a91547b44e6912adb647a049ed70fe50.jpeg)
